claim: The writing-skills routing trigger-glob list now includes skills/review-and-fix/references/*.md, and this glob list must be identical across all three carrying files (coupled-site invariant).
verify_against: The two other prompt-extension trigger-glob lists plus any lib/test/run.sh pin asserting the trigger globs.
verify_hint: Compare the trigger-glob list across implement.md, review.md, review-and-fix.md; confirm all three include skills/review-and-fix/references/*.md.

claim: docs/DEVFLOW_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md and docs/review-and-fix-budget.md assert the step procedures live in exactly eight reference files under skills/review-and-fix/references/.
verify_against: The actual contents of skills/review-and-fix/references/.
verify_hint: List the directory and confirm each of the eight named files exists with no missing or extra reference.

claim: docs/efficiency-trace.md claims the fix-commit subject template is WRITTEN by references/fixing.md Step 3 item 6 and PARSED by lib/efficiency-trace.sh (FIX_COMMIT_SUBJECT_PREFIX).
verify_against: fixing.md Step 3 item 6 and lib/efficiency-trace.sh FIX_COMMIT_SUBJECT_PREFIX.
verify_hint: Confirm fixing.md item 6 writes 'fix: address review findings (iteration {N})' and efficiency-trace.sh's prefix matches.

verify_hint: Confirm fixing.md Step 3 contains the assert_pin_red_under behavioral-fix-pin mutation-check step and both docs point there.

claim: docs/review-and-fix-budget.md AFTER measured values — root 3,209 words, initial load 5,493, max active step 16,754 — must equal live python3 word counts and the #530 budget pins in lib/test/run.sh.
verify_against: Live python3 bytes.split() counts + run.sh #530 budget block constants.
verify_hint: Re-measure root (expect 3,209), root+ext (5,493), root+ext+shadow-review.md (16,754); confirm Measured cells and run.sh constants agree.

claim: docs/review-and-fix-budget.md declares the named justified-growth warning review-and-fix-split-cumulative-growth with delta +3,894 words (cumulative 42,379 vs 38,485) and net reduction 32,992 (38,485 -> 5,493); figures and label must match run.sh pins.
verify_against: The growth-delta / net-reduction / warning-label pins in run.sh's #530 budget block.
verify_hint: Confirm run.sh pins the label and that arithmetic 38,485-5,493=32,992 and 42,379-38,485=3,894 hold in the doc.

claim: The changeset prose asserts the always-loaded prompt is reduced by 32,992 words and the thin root is <=3,500 words — must agree with the budget doc.
verify_against: docs/review-and-fix-budget.md net-reduction and root ceiling figures.
verify_hint: Confirm the changeset's 32,992 and <=3,500 claims match the budget doc.

claim: docs/review-bundle-budget.md and CLAUDE.md both carry the re-measured Default per-pass unique path 28,688 / GNU 28,093; run.sh review-bundle pins must agree.
verify_against: CLAUDE.md figures and run.sh review-bundle pins.
verify_hint: Confirm all sites state 28,688 / 28,093 and none was left at 28,687 / 28,092.

claim: ISSUE AC: 'plugin root at most 3,000 words' — shipped root measures 3,209 against a 3,500 ceiling, exceeding the issue AC (justified by the #557 ceiling raise).
verify_against: Issue #530 AC vs shipped measurement and documented justification.
verify_hint: Compare AC 3,000 vs measured 3,209 / ceiling 3,500; determine if the deviation is documented and justified.

claim: ISSUE AC: 'root+ext+active-step at most 15,000 words' — shipped max step measures 16,754 against a 17,000 ceiling, exceeding the issue AC (justified by the #557 ceiling raise).

verify_hint: Compare AC 15,000 vs measured 16,754 / ceiling 17,000; determine if the deviation is documented and justified.
